features: NATURIGIN Hair Dye Light Ash Blonde 10.2 creates a cool ash blonde hair colour, perfect for achieving a cold blonde colour. Additionally, this hair colour can be used to create highlights, adding ashy tones to your hair. Enjoy professional salon-quality results.
Covers grey hair up to 100%. Made with natural ingredients. This hair colour is an ammonia free hair dye, without parabens, and SLS so it is gentler on the scalp and hair.

An advanced naturally derived formula, with a unique blend of certified organic lemon and mandarin essential oils, as well as 10 other pure and gentle organic extracts and natural oils that protects the hair during colouring and adds shine and nourishment to your hair.
NATURIGIN has succeeded in creating a hair colour that only needs to work in the hair for 30 minutes. Get a full hair dye kit with hair dye gloves included.
Choose from 20 hair dye colours, including brown, blonde, red, and platinum. Find your perfect new hair dye and elevate your style with our selection of certified natural hair colour.

NATURIGIN Hair Colour Guide Merchant video What results can I expect from NATURIGIN natural hair dye? NATURIGIN provides vibrant, natural-looking colour with 100% grey coverage, enriched with nourishing organic ingredients to leave your hair soft, healthy, and shiny. How long will the color from NATURIGIN last? NATURIGINвЂ™s long-lasting formula provides rich colour that lasts up to 6 weeks with proper care, resisting fading to keep your hair looking fresh and vibrant. How do I choose the right NATURIGIN shade for my hair? We recommend a shade within two tones of your current hair colour for the most natural-looking results. You wonвЂ™t be able to make drastic color changes, like going from dark to blonde. Staying close to your shade ensures beautiful, even coverage. Should I do a patch or strand test before using NATURIGIN? Yes, we recommend doing both. A patch test helps ensure you have no skin sensitivities, while a strand test shows how the colour will look on your hair. These tests ensure a safe application and help achieve your desired shade. How does NATURIGIN compare to other hair dyes in terms of ingredients? NATURIGIN is made with organic extracts and natural ingredients, free from ammonia, parabens, and other harsh chemicals.
